< Home >

GET restapi/personal/studentplan/assessments/topics/v1?courseId={courseId}&fromId={fromId}

Returns list of topic assessments for the course and student.

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
courseId

The course identifier.

 integer

Required
fromId

The identifier of the topic to start search from.

 integer

Required

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

List of topics.

Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.StudentPlan.Assessments.StudentPlanTopic
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Id

Topic id.

 integer

None.
Plans

List of plans.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.StudentPlan.Assessments.StudentPlanPlan

None.
Name

Topic name.

 string

None.
ColorCode

The topic color schema.

 string

None.
StartDateTime

Topic start date and time.

 date

None.
EndDateTime

Topic end date and time.

 date

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
[
  {
    "Id": 1,
    "Plans": [
      {
        "StartDate": "2026-03-07T09:02:56Z",
        "StopDate": "2026-03-07T09:02:56Z",
        "Activities": [
          {
            "Id": 1,
            "Title": "sample string 2",
            "Url": "sample string 3",
            "IconUrl": "sample string 4",
            "Assessments": [
              {
                "LearningObjectiveId": 1,
                "Url": "sample string 2",
                "Comment": "sample string 3",
                "LearningObjectiveTitle": "sample string 4",

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<ArrayOfStudentPlanTopic xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <StudentPlanTopic>
    <ColorCode>sample string 3</ColorCode>
    <EndDateTime>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</EndDateTime>
    <Id>1</Id>
    <Name>sample string 2</Name>
    <Plans>
      <StudentPlanPlan>
        <Activities>
          <Activity>
            <AssessmentTitle>sample string 5</AssessmentTitle>
            <Assessments>
              <Assessment>
                <AssessmentTitle>sample string 5</AssessmentTitle>
                <Comment>sample string 3</Comment>
                <LearningObjectiveId>1</LearningObjectiveId>
                <LearningObjectiveTitle>sample string 4</LearningObjectiveTitle>
                <Url>sample string 2</Url>
              </Assessment>
              <Assessment>
                <AssessmentTitle>sample string 5</AssessmentTitle>
                <Comment>sample string 3</Comment>
                <LearningObjectiveId>1</LearningObjectiveId>
                <LearningObjectiveTitle>sample string 4</LearningObjectiveTitle>
                <Url>sample string 2</Url>
              </Assessment>
            </Assessments>
            <Feedback>
              <HasRichContent>true</HasRichContent>
              <PlainContent>sample string 2</PlainContent>
              <RichContent>sample string 1</RichContent>
            </Feedback>
            <IconUrl>sample string 4</IconUrl>
            <Id>1</Id>
            <Title>sample string 2</Title>
            <Url>sample string 3</Url>
          </Activity>
          <Activity>
            <AssessmentTitle>sample string 5</AssessmentTitle>
            <Assessments>
              <Assessment>
                <AssessmentTitle>sample string 5</AssessmentTitle>
                <Comment>sample string 3</Comment>
                <LearningObjectiveId>1</LearningObjectiveId>
                <LearningObjectiveTitle>sample string 4</LearningObjectiveTitle>
                <Url>sample string 2</Url>
              </Assessment>
              <Assessment>
                <AssessmentTitle>sample string 5</AssessmentTitle>
                <Comment>sample string 3</Comment>
                <LearningObjectiveId>1</LearningObjectiveId>
                <LearningObjectiveTitle>sample string 4</LearningObjectiveTitle>
                <Url>sample string 2</Url>
              </Assessment>
            </Assessments>
            <Feedback>
              <HasRichContent>true</HasRichContent>
              <PlainContent>sample string 2</PlainContent>
              <RichContent>sample string 1</RichContent>
            </Feedback>
            <IconUrl>sample string 4</IconUrl>
            <Id>1</Id>
            <Title>sample string 2</Title>
            <Url>sample string 3</Url>
          </Activity>
        </Activities>
        <StartDate>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</StartDate>
        <StopDate>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</StopDate>
      </StudentPlanPlan>
      <StudentPlanPlan>
        <Activities>
          <Activity>
            <AssessmentTitle>sample string 5</AssessmentTitle>
            <Assessments>
              <Assessment>
                <AssessmentTitle>sample string 5</AssessmentTitle>
                <Comment>sample string 3</Comment>
                <LearningObjectiveId>1</LearningObjectiveId>
                <LearningObjectiveTitle>sample string 4</LearningObjectiveTitle>
                <Url>sample string 2</Url>

                <Url>sample string 2</Url>

            </Assessments>
            <Feedback>
              <HasRichContent>true</HasRichContent>
              <PlainContent>sample string 2</PlainContent>
              <RichContent>sample string 1</RichContent>

            <IconUrl>sample string 4</IconUrl>

    <StartDateTime>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</StartDateTime>
  </StudentPlanTopic>

                <Comment>sample string 3</Comment>
                <LearningObjectiveId>1</LearningObjectiveId>
                <LearningObjectiveTitle>sample string 4</LearningObjectiveTitle>
                <Url>sample string 2</Url>

            <Feedback>

              <PlainContent>sample string 2</PlainContent>
              <RichContent>sample string 1</RichContent>

            <IconUrl>sample string 4</IconUrl>

        <StartDate>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</StartDate>
        <StopDate>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</StopDate>
      </StudentPlanPlan>
    </Plans>
    <StartDateTime>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</StartDateTime>
  </StudentPlanTopic>
</ArrayOfStudentPlanTopic>
